homepage.title: Katie Lam MP, Member of Parliament for the Weald of Kent
homepage.h1: I’m Katie Lam , Member of Parliament for the Weald of Kent .
homepage.meta_description: Katie Lam is the first Member of Parliament for the new constituency of the Weald of Kent, a truly rural area of the South East of England. The Weald of Kent encompasses two small towns (Tenterden and Cranbrook) and a large number of villages across three Borough Councils and 56 Civil Parishes.
homepage.text_excerpt: Katie Lam MP, Member of Parliament for the Weald of Kent 0 Skip to Content About Katie Support Katie Clubs Contact Keep in touch! Open Menu Close Menu About Katie Support Katie Clubs Contact Keep in touch! Open Menu Close Menu About Katie Support Katie Clubs Contact Keep in touch! I’m Katie Lam , Member of Parliament for the Weald of Kent . Please do look around and get in touch — I’d love to hear from you . Learn a little more about me . I live in the Weald with my golden retriever, Bailey. Before I became a Member of Parliament I worked in senior positions in finance, the technology industry and government — including at 10 Downing Street and the Home Office. I am proud to serve the Weald of Kent as its first ever MP. Learn a little more about the Weald of Kent. The Weald of Kent is a brand new countryside constituency. One of the largest constituencies in the South East of England, It covers the towns of Tenterden and Cranbrook as well as well over 100 villages across three borough councils and 56 civil parishes. Promoted by Katie Lam, of Tenterden Business Centre, Ashford Road, Tenterden TN30 6SP. Keep in touch! Keep in touch! Katie.Lam.MP@Parliament.uk

pages.title: About Katie Lam MP, Member of Parliament for the Weald of Kent — Katie Lam for Weald of Kent
pages.meta_description: Katie Lam is the Member of Parliament for the Weald of Kent. She lives in Sissinghurst and has had a successful career in the private sector as well as working in senior positions in several government departments including the Prime Minister
pages.text_excerpt: About Katie Lam MP, Member of Parliament for the Weald of Kent — Katie Lam for Weald of Kent 0 Skip to Content About Katie Support Katie Clubs Contact Keep in touch! Open Menu Close Menu About Katie Support Katie Clubs Contact Keep in touch! Open Menu Close Menu About Katie Support Katie Clubs Contact Keep in touch! Meet Katie Katie Lam is the Member of Parliament for the Weald of Kent. The Weald of Kent was a brand new constituency in the July 2024 General Election, and Katie was elected as its first ever MP. One of the largest constituencies in the South East of England, the Weald of Kent is a truly rural patch of Britain’s most beautiful countryside. The area covers the towns of Tenterden and Cranbrook as well as well over 100 villages across three borough councils (Ashford, Maidstone and Tunbridge Wells) and 56 civil parishes. She is a Shadow Home Office minister and Opposition Assistant Whip. Before Parliament, Katie worked in senior roles in government: in the Home Office, she focused on national security (counter terrorism, MI5 oversight and serious organised crime); and in 10 Downing Street, she served as Deputy Chief of Staff and head of the Prime Minister’s Business Team. She also set up and ran the Office for Talent and the Office for Investment. Katie spent the rest of her career in the private sector. She was Chief of Staff at AI company Faculty, one of the UK’s fastest growing tech businesses, and before that spent the bulk of her career at Goldman Sachs, first in equity research, and later leading teams running various projects, analysis and operations internally. Katie is a Governor at Frank Barnes School for Deaf Children and was a Trustee of the Ivors Academy Trust. She is also an award-winning lyricist and scriptwriter. Katie (and her golden retriever, Bailey!) live in the Weald. Promoted by Katie Lam, of Tenterden Business Centre, Ashford Road, Tenterden TN30 6SP. Keep in touch! Keep in touch! Katie.Lam.MP@Parliament.uk

pages.title: Contact Katie — Katie Lam for Weald of Kent
pages.h1: If there is anything you need me for, please get in touch : I’d love to help if I can.
pages.meta_description: Get in touch with Katie Lam MP, Member of Parliament for the Weald of Kent.
pages.text_excerpt: Contact Katie — Katie Lam for Weald of Kent 0 Skip to Content About Katie Support Katie Clubs Contact Keep in touch! Open Menu Close Menu About Katie Support Katie Clubs Contact Keep in touch! Open Menu Close Menu About Katie Support Katie Clubs Contact Keep in touch! If there is anything you need me for, please get in touch : I’d love to help if I can. Please fill in this form which will come straight through to me. There are strict rules about supporting your constituents (and only your constituents!) which is why I need your address. I’ve also included some information on what I can help with, as well as what I unfortunately am not able to assist you with below. I should be able to help with any issues that involve Parliament and Government departments, such as the Department for Work and Pensions or the UK Immigration and Visa Service. I can also assist with issues that involve Kent County Council, or Ashford Borough Council; Maidstone Borough Council; or Tunbridge Wells Borough Council, but if the matter is related to planning, the best person to contact is your local Ward Member. You can find out who represents you on your local Borough Council here . If you are having a problem with a private company I will also do my best to help, but they are under no obligation to reply to my letters and emails. My team and I are unable to help you with filling in forms, such as to apply for benefits or housing ( but Citizens Advice can !) Also, I am unable to become directly involved in legal proceedings. All correspondence received by the Office of Katie Lam MP, is treated in line with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) 2018. A copy of the office Privacy Notice is available online at www.katieforkent.com/privacy. Promoted by Katie Lam, of Tenterden Business Centre, Ashford Road, Tenterden TN30 6SP. Keep in touch! Keep in touch! Katie.Lam.MP@Parliament.uk
